## Strategic Pivot: Evryn Product First

Team agent build (Lucas) paused — not cancelled. Building Evryn product MVP (v0.2 "Gatekeeper's Inbox") for Mark (real-Mark = Mark Titus, Seattle filmmaker / Eva's Wild founder) first. See `evryn-backend/docs/BUILD-EVRYN-MVP.md`. Evryn is a broker, not a SaaS — surfaces connections from a gatekeeper's inbox; everyone is a "user," both sides pay per-connection.

## How AC works now

AC drives DC and QC as **subagents** (build/review loops), not hand-relayed mailbox notes. Protocol: `docs/protocols/ac-orchestration-protocol.md`. Subagent startup loading is standardized via the **Startup Context Cascade** (verbatim "read and faithfully follow" trigger + receipts watch on the task-specific additions), with **`#cascade-override`** the only guard-railed way to narrow a load (2026-06-06). QC verifies every real code change. **AC promotes QC's standing patterns** into QC's CLAUDE.md "Patterns This Role Watches For" section (QC can't write her own; new 2026-06-03). **Ping-by-default** on `#team-alerts`. Arch + BUILD docs: AC holds edit rights, **editing needs Justin's explicit auth first**.

## What's Next (critical path to Mark-live)

- **Context-architecture fixes: BUILT + QC-verified + DEPLOYED (AC1, 2026-06-08, `75fba9e`).** The live-test findings previously *routed* to Soren are now *shipped*: conversation history is runtime-owned (Evryn writes only the body; the runtime appends history once, labeled with real display-name + email, not "(user)"/UUID), the attached-history count is visible at `submit_draft` so Justin can verify it, plus a **double-send guard** (a re-approve after a successful send can't send twice) and **silent-failure alerts** (stale-check / approval-lookup / cron-checker DB errors now `notifyDev` instead of swallowing). Mira **PR #9** (identity tighten — create-from-zero gate + context-duplicate wording) merged; `core.md` history-claim scoped to the email/submit_draft path. Reviewed by **real DC + real QC** (the earlier generic-subagent review was redone properly — see AGENT_PATTERNS "Getting Subagents to Actually Load Their Context"). 2 minor non-blockers (drain-cooldown reset; stale collision help-string) → SPRINT hardening list (week of 6/8).
- **Oregon cutover: DONE (AC0 #2, 2026-06-04 eve).** Prod is now Oregon ("Evryn Product (West Coast)", ref `wvaaqwapueycyxyhxdnh`): 036 migration applied + verified, pre/post `pg_dump` taken (`backend/backups/oregon-{pre,post}-036-2026-06-04.sql`, untracked), Railway repointed → Oregon, master (`1610f3b`) deployed + healthy (Supabase/Slack/polling confirmed). **Old East (`maruxkjwlfltlmureqkt`) still live — AC0 retires it once FULLY confident West is flawless; don't delete yet.** Apply mechanism: full-path PG17 psql + `SUPABASE_DB_URL_{PROD,DEV,EAST}` (see `backups/README.md`).
- **Dev/staging DB: UP (AC1, 2026-06-04).** `Evryn Product — Dev` (us-west-2, ref `maqkdesopsskptpxjbqs`) created + seeded as a **faithful mirror of prod** (5 tables, citext+vector, RLS, policies, comments, test data). Enables QC live-tests + **dev-first migrations**. Org now **Supabase Pro** (~$45/mo, 3 projects). `.env`: runtime = Oregon prod; admin DB urls `SUPABASE_DB_URL_PROD`/`_DEV`/`_EAST` (dev API creds in Bitwarden, not active `.env`). Full decisions: **ADR-037**.
- **evryn-backend master (`1610f3b`) DEPLOYED to Oregon** (AC0 #2) — the validated bundle (EVR-71/68 + ADR-036 + Mira's triage beat + go-live reconciliation + AC1 DB/doc work). 036 column live on Oregon. `POLL_INTERVAL_MS=10000` (test cadence — slow at Mark-live); `SEND_ENABLED=true` (already on in prod); `TEST_RECIPIENT`/`NODE_ENV=development` = dead config (6/8 sweep).
- **Integration test: Phases 2-5 PASSED** (create-from-zero · onboarding · notes · triage validation). Phase 2 (`create_user` not upsert, scope-lock, deep research, draft→approve→send) + Phase 3 (onboarding — Mark's gold/pass/edge criteria gathered) + Phase 4 (notes vs answer key) + **Phase 5 (triage: 18 fixtures → effectively 18/18 on reasoning; she web-verifies + distinguishes failed-verification from absent-footprint; "grade on reasoning, not label-match" — full nuance `evryn-backend/tests/results-2026-06-08-phase5.md`)**. **Phase 6 (live-fire prod pipeline) is the one remaining phase** — plan `evryn-backend/tests/phase6-live-fire-v02.md`. Fixture data cleaned from prod after Phase 5 (Mark restored to his 5 onboarding notes). **Real-Mark email: not yet sent.** Findings shipped: context-arch → built+deployed (AC1); verify-and-lock/gold-internal → Mira (shipped); **B2c/edge bug → Mira triage.md fix pushed `30d85f0`, needs deploy**; attachment-only calibration + dummy-Mark → adversarial test (post-launch).
- **Mark wiped to ZERO (2026-06-03).** Test-Mark row + 49 messages + 4 items deleted; DB now holds only Evryn + Operator + a Google-Workspace test lead (kept — trains "ignore Google pings"). Backup committed `f26414c`.
- **Integration test is now CREATE-FROM-ZERO** (was look-up-existing). Phase 2: operator introduces a never-seen Mark → Evryn creates his record via `create_user` (first real test of the ADR-036 tool); new Phase 2b re-tests the ADR-030 verify-and-lock *find* path. Test materials conformed (`f7f48a0`, `1627b8b`).

- **Next (FRESH AC0 + Justin):** **Phase 6** (live-fire, `tests/phase6-live-fire-v02.md` — Justin plays Mark) → **M1 silent-death detector** (the one hard go-live build gate, not built) → go-live gate → real-Mark email. **Committed-not-deployed** (need `railway up`): Mira's B2c fix `30d85f0` + AC0's token-log/Phase-6-doc commits. ## Infrastructure

- **evryn-backend default branch: `main`** — renamed from `master` 2026-06-08 (AC3, GitHub native rename: default moved, redirects set, canonical tree synced, `origin/master` deleted). Now in line with all other repos. Deploy-neutral (`railway up` is branch-agnostic; auto-deploy off) — verified healthy.
- **Railway: AUTO-DEPLOY OFF — staying off by design.** Manual `railway up`. Live deploy = `75fba9e` on **Oregon** (2026-06-08, AC1 — context-arch fix batch; healthy: Supabase/Slack/polling confirmed). `PROACTIVE_CHECK_HOUR_PT=8`; quiet hours 18–8 PT; `POLL_INTERVAL_MS=10000` (test cadence — slow at Mark-live).
- **Supabase: on PRO. Prod migrated to Oregon (us-west-2) "Evryn Product (West Coast)"** (AC1; faithful copy, connection-verified) + **dev project "Evryn Product — Dev"** (Oregon, seeded mirror, 2026-06-04). Old East (`maruxkjwlfltlmureqkt`) live until cutover-retire; its `pg_dump` (`backups/full-public-2026-06-03.sql`) is the archive. DB state: system actors + 1 Google lead (Mark wiped 2026-06-03). **Backup model:** Pro **daily auto-backups** (primary, live on prod+dev) + periodic real **`pg_dump`** (portable/archival) — replaces the old non-restorable JSON dumps (ADR-037).
- Slack: `#evryn-approvals` quiet 18–8 PT w/ queue+replay. `#emergency-alerts` = HARD go-live gate (Slack bot, NOT Twilio).
